---
title: "Data Based Analysis"
---

## Overview

This chapter explores emerging frontiers in urban morphology: urban morphometrics, spatial morphology, and spatial data science. Urban morphometrics is a quantitative field aiming at extracting patterns from large amounts of morphological data; spatial morphology expands the field to the analysis of unbuilt space mostly using space syntax theory and landscape ecology principles; spatial data science as a cross-cutting field increasingly adopts urban morphological information to enrich the understanding of spatial phenomena of environmental, social and economic kind.


## Techniques


```{r echo=FALSE}
library(igraph)
library(visNetwork)
library(dplyr)

# 1. Load your data
nodes <- data.frame(
  id = 1:3,
  label = c("Node A", "Node B", "Node C"),
  title = c("Click to go to Chapter 1", "Click for Chapter 2", "Click for Chapter 3"),
  url = c("../catalog/examples/bindels_gietema.html", "../catalog/examples/ijburg.html",
          "../catalog/examples/kumbh_mela.html")
)

edges <- data.frame(
  from = c(1, 2),
  to = c(3, 3),
  value = c(10, 2) # Relation strength
) %>%
  # IMPORTANT: Length must be inversely proportional to value
  # We use a large multiplier (e.g., 500) to make the differences obvious
  mutate(length = 300 / value)

# 2. Create the interactive graph
visNetwork(nodes, edges) %>%
  visNodes(shape = "dot", size = 20) %>%
  # We explicitly tell the edges NOT to inherit a single length
  visEdges(smooth = FALSE) %>% 
  visPhysics(
    solver = "barnesHut",
    barnesHut = list(
      gravitationalConstant = -2000, # Keeps nodes from overlapping
      centralGravity = 0.3,
      springLength = 100,            # This is the "base", but individual edge 'length' overrides it
      springConstant = 0.04          # Higher = stiffer springs
    ),
    stabilization = TRUE
  ) %>%
  # IMPROVED CLICK JS
  visEvents(click = "function(params) {
    if (params.nodes.length > 0) {
      var nodeId = params.nodes;
      var nodeData = this.body.data.nodes.get(nodeId);
      if (nodeData.url) {
        // Uncomment the line below to debug if clicking does nothing
        // alert('Navigating to: ' + nodeData.url); 
        window.location.assign(nodeData.url);
      }
    }
  }")





```
